name: SmartCup League World Cup 2026 MVP

phases.name: Group Stage
phases.description: SmartCup rules page phase multiplier: x1. Live BolaoCore QueryState also reported Group Stage weight 1 on 2026-05-29.

phases.name: Round of 32
phases.description: SmartCup rules page phase multiplier: x2. Verify against BolaoCore once phase is registered.

notes: FIFA lists the 2026 World Cup as a 104-match tournament.
Rules page source: https://www.smartcupleague.com/rules, verified from the published frontend bundle on 2026-05-29.
Minimum prediction and Championship Pick entry is the dynamic $3 USD equivalent converted to VARA.
Predictions close 10 minutes before kickoff; the agent adds its own 15-minute safety buffer.

Phase weights follow the SmartCup rules page at https://www.smartcupleague.com/rules: Group Stage x1, Round of 32 x2, Round of 16 x3, Quarter-Finals x4, Semi-Finals x5, Third Place Match x6, Final x8.
Scoring follows the rules page: exact score 3 points, correct outcome 1 point, incorrect 0 points, multiplied by phase weight.
Final Prize Pool distribution follows the rules page: 1st 45%, 2nd 25%, 3rd 15%, 4th 10%, 5th 5%; tied positions combine and split.
Championship Pick bonus points follow the rules page: Champion 20, Runner-Up 10, Third Place 5, exact position only.
Only Group Stage was registered in live BolaoCore QueryState on 2026-05-29; later knockout phase weights should be checked against on-chain phases once they are registered.
The agent should reconcile this profile with live BolaoCore QueryState on every planning run, because phases and r32_lock_time may be registered during the tournament.
The active SmartCup MVP entry distribution is 85% match winner pool, 10% final prize pool, and 5% DAO/protocol fee.
